Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description:
This plugin is in alpha — expect bugs. Please report any you find, and if you'd like to contribute, join in!

A helper for Doman Mahjong at the Gold Saucer. Two modes:

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Starts off by default. You must accept a short notice before auto-play can be turned on, and you can switch back to hints or turn it off at any time from the plugin window.
Changelog: v0.1.0.11 — Agari + Riichi popup fixes. Tsumo and Ron at the self-declare popup now fire their dedicated opcodes (9 and 10) instead of routing through the call-prompt button-row (opcode 11) — pre-fix the bot detected the win, dispatched, reported Ok, but the popup never closed and the win was lost. The Riichi/Pass popup now also surfaces Discard as a legal action so the policy can decline-and-discard via the tile-click handshake; previously it looped `auto-pass[opt=1]` because the addon's Pass button doesn't dismiss this popup (you pass by clicking a tile). EfficiencyPolicy now catches DiscardScorer invariant exceptions on shanten-invalid mid-transition states (post-MinKan-pre-rinshan, etc.) and returns Pass cleanly instead of crashing the dispatch loop. Known limitations (carry-over): post-MinKan transient and post-2nd-consecutive-pon stuck states still freeze the bot until manual click — both need a capture (`/mjauto capture <label>`) to identify the right dispatch protocol; see docs/dispatch-protocol.md.
